description: Document regulating the inheritance of the estate in Sana'a, next to the synagogue, that was left behind by Meri Daud. The house was split and the document details all the different parts of the house. (Information from Goitein, The Yemenites, pp. 152-156). VMR
description_he: מסמך על חלוקת ירושת נכס בצנעה ליד בית הכנסת שהשאיר מרי דאוד.
